subject: ChatGPT Images 2.0: readable text, thinking mode, 2K resolution
snippet: OpenAI ships ChatGPT Images 2.0, Kimi drops 300-agent coding model, Nous ships self-improving agent, 15M world model trains on one GPU Stay updated with today's top AI news, papers, and repos. Signup | Work With Us | Follow on X | Archive H…
body_html:
OpenAI ships ChatGPT Images 2.0, Kimi drops 300-agent coding model, Nous ships self-improving agent, 15M world model trains on one GPU
Stay updated with today's top AI news, papers, and repos.
Signup | Work With Us | Follow on X | Archive

Hey Aikkara,
AI is quietly crossing a line: from generating outputs to doing actual work.

OpenAI's Images 2.0 thinks before it draws. Kimi K2.6 codes for 13 hours straight with 300 parallel agents. A new attention paper lets deep layers skip the noise and talk directly to each other. The pattern is clear: every layer of the stack is getting smarter about how it operates, not just what it produces.

We're watching AI grow up in real time.
Together with ·

Lior Alexander. Founder of AlphaSignal and former ML Engineer. Previously built ML systems at Iguazio, Guesty, Enphase, Mila.

Signals

1. New 15M parameter world model trains on one GPU and plans 48x faster than foundation models
2. Nous Research ships a self-improving open-source agent that learns from every conversation
3. Quantum-classical hybrid model matches deep learning benchmarks using 100x less data
4. New 18B frankenmerge model runs on 12–16 GB GPUs by stacking two 9B models
5. New attention method lets deep layers directly query any earlier layer, boosting LLM accuracy by 2%
Top News
OpenAI ships ChatGPT Images 2.0 with thinking, 2K resolution, and web search
21,064 Likes

OpenAI just dropped ChatGPT Images 2.0, and it finally fixes the stuff that made AI image tools frustrating to actually use.

The old problem? AI images looked cool but broke on real tasks: warped text, ignored instructions, wrong layouts. Images 2.0 targets exactly those weak spots.

Here's what's new and why it matters:

  • Text that actually renders -- readable typography inside posters, infographics, and UI mockups, up to 2K resolution
  • Thinking mode -- the model reasons through your prompt before drawing, searches the web for real-time info, self-checks outputs, and generates up to 8 consistent images from one prompt
  • Aspect ratios from 3:1 to 1:3 -- banners, slides, posters, mobile graphics, all ready to use
  • Multilingual text that flows naturally inside images, not just translated words dropped in

For API access, call gpt-image-2 through the Images API or Responses API. Thinking mode requires Plus, Pro, or Business. Base model is free for all ChatGPT and Codex users.
READ MORE
forward →

Most agent frameworks break on the real web

Most agent frameworks assume clean input. The real web doesn't care.

Bright Data Web Scraper API handles JavaScript-rendered pages, bot detection, CAPTCHAs, and rate limits - so you don't have to.

  • One API call → clean JSON output
  • 600+ pre-built scrapers (Google, Amazon, LinkedIn & more)
  • Agent-ready: plug structured data straight into your LLM pipelines

Built for AI products that depend on reliable web intelligence.

partner with us →
Top News
Kimi drops open-source coding model running 300 parallel agents for 12+ hours
17,532 Likes

Moonshot AI just dropped Kimi K2.6, a fully open-source coding model that can work autonomously for over 12 hours straight without asking you a single question.

Think of it like hiring a senior engineer who never sleeps. You give it one prompt, it spins up 300 parallel sub-agents (mini AI workers), and they all chip away at your project simultaneously. That's triple the agents K2.5 could handle.

Here's what it actually pulled off in testing:

  • Rewrote a financial matching engine over 13 hours, made 1,000+ tool calls, and boosted throughput by 185%
  • Built a local AI runtime in Zig (a rare systems language) from scratch, hitting 193 tokens/sec
  • Generates full frontends with animations, auth, and databases from one prompt

The API is OpenAI-compatible at $0.60 per million input tokens, roughly a quarter of Claude Opus pricing. Weights are on Hugging Face, and you can run it locally via Ollama.
READ MORE
forward →
Presented by Fuel iX by TELUS Digital
Can your LLM withstand a prompt injection attack?

We tested 24 leading GenAI models for vulnerabilities. All 24 failed, with attack success rates up to 64%.

Every model demonstrated exploitable flaws that turn AI into an attack vector.

Download our report for security profiles on all 24 models and strategies to secure your AI stack.

partner with us →
Top Repo
Developer reverse-engineers Claude's design system and open-sources it free
3,774 Likes

Someone reverse-engineered Claude's design system and turned it into a free, open-source skill called Huashu Design. Think of a "skill" as a plugin you drop into your AI coding agent, and it instantly gains new abilities.

One command gets you started:

npx skills add alchaincyf/huashu-design

Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more. You just describe what you want in plain text, and the agent builds it. Here's what you can ship:

  • Clickable iOS/web app prototypes in a real iPhone frame, auto-tested with Playwright
  • Presentation slides that export as editable PPTX (real text boxes, not images)
  • Animations exported as MP4 or GIF, with background music included
  • A 5-dimension design review with a radar chart and a fix list

The coolest part: it pulls real brand colors from official sources instead of guessing. No Figma, no GUI, no buttons. Just type, hit enter, get a finished design.
READ MORE
